description: Semi-realistic point-and-click adventure character, base movement/action set: idle, walk-right, walk-left, walk-down, walk-up, talk.

states.name: idle
states.action: Standing idle loop: subtle breathing, a tiny blink, and a very small body bob; essentially the same pose and facing in every frame. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces the viewer in a relaxed standing pose in every frame.
Keep the pose, silhouette, and palette essentially identical between frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Feet stay planted.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-right
states.action: Rightward walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-left
states.action: Leftward walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel left, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-down
states.action: Facing-down walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the front toward the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces and moves toward the viewer in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-up
states.action: Facing-up walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from behind, away from the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces and moves away from the viewer, back visible, in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: talk
states.action: Talking loop: small head tilt and hand gesture variation while facing the viewer. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces the viewer in every frame.
Vary only head tilt and a small hand or arm gesture between frames.
Do not draw speech bubbles, text, or punctuation marks.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
